testCases.title: Quantity Stepper - Invalid Input Rejected
testCases.failedAssertion: [STATE] negative number rejected client-side, qty reverts to last valid value, no API call fired; [STATE] decimal rejected client-side, qty reverts to last valid value, no API call fired
consoleErrors: Invariant Violation: Missing field 'currencyCode' while writing result for query (Apollo cache, VCST-5101 pre-existing)
Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 (POST /graphql — ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity with quantity:1.5)
networkErrors: POST /graphql (ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity, quantity:-1) → 200 with GraphQL ARGUMENT error: 'quantity' must be > 0
testCases.notes: Sub-case 1 (-1): typed '-1' into qty spinbutton, pressed Tab. Spinbutton retained value '-1' — no client-side rejection. ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity mutation fired with quantity:-1; server returned GraphQL ARGUMENT error. Sub-case 2 (abc): browser HTML5 input[type=number] intrinsically blocked non-numeric characters — browser_type threw; this sub-assertion effectively passes via browser constraint only. Sub-case 3 (1.5): typed '1.5' into qty spinbutton, pressed Tab. Spinbutton retained value '1.5' — no client-side rejection. ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity mutation fired with quantity:1.5; server returned HTTP 400. Verdict: FAIL — client-side validation absent for negative and decimal inputs; invalid values reach the API.

testCases.title: Coupons Sidebar — Empty State: No Preset Cards When User Has No Available Promotion Coupons
testCases.notes: Precondition requires env vars {{NO_COUPON_USER_EMAIL}} and {{NO_COUPON_USER_PASSWORD}} — neither is defined in .env.vcst or .env.local. No seed fixture exists for a user with zero available coupons. Cannot execute without provisioning a dedicated test user account and setting these env vars.

testCases.title: Coupons Sidebar — Failed Coupon (System Error) Shows Correct Error Text
testCases.notes: Test step requires triggering a backend system error on coupon validation via DevTools network intercept (blocked by REAL-USER RULE — no browser_evaluate/script injection) or a backend mock server. The CSV itself marks this 'MANUAL VERIFICATION REQUIRED'. No known coupon code that triggers the type:'failed' path is available in the test environment. Cannot reproduce the error path without network-level interception.

testCases.title: Coupons Sidebar — i18n: Widget Labels Render in Non-English Locale
testCases.notes: Precondition requires env var {{CULTURE_NAME}} to be set. This variable is not defined in .env.vcst. The test navigates to {{FRONT_URL}}/{{CULTURE_NAME}}/cart — without a value, the URL cannot be constructed. Cannot execute without defining a supported non-English locale code in the environment configuration.

testCases.title: Coupons Sidebar — checkout_coupon_enabled Flag No Longer Hides Widget (Behavior Change Flag)
testCases.notes: Test step requires navigating to Admin Stores > B2B-store > Settings and locating 'checkout_coupon_enabled'. Admin was accessed (vcst-qa.govirto.com, admin/Password1!) and the B2B-store Settings blade was opened (94 settings). Searched for both 'checkout_coupon_enabled' and 'coupon' — both returned 'No settings match the current filters.' The $cfg.checkout_coupon_enabled is a storefront theme setting (settings_data.json / vc-frontend $cfg.*), not a platform store setting exposed in the Admin SPA blade. The test step 'navigate to Stores > [store] > Settings and locate checkout_coupon_enabled' cannot be completed as written; the flag is not configurable through the Admin UI settings blade.

bugs.title: Cart quantity stepper accepts negative and decimal values without client-side validation — invalid quantities submitted to API
bugs.failedAssertion: [STATE] negative/decimal inputs rejected client-side with no API call fired
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in as a B2B user with an item in cart. 2. Navigate to /cart. 3. Click the quantity spinbutton for any line item. 4. Type '-1' and press Tab. Observe: spinbutton shows '-1', ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity mutation fires with quantity:-1. 5. Type '1.5' and press Tab. Observe: spinbutton shows '1.5', ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity mutation fires with quantity:1.5 (HTTP 400 returned).
bugs.expected: Client-side validation rejects negative numbers and decimals immediately on input loss (Tab/blur). Quantity reverts to the last valid positive integer. No API mutation is fired for invalid input.
bugs.actual: Spinbutton accepts and displays '-1' and '1.5'. The ChangeFullCartItemsQuantity mutation is fired for both. Server rejects -1 with a GraphQL ARGUMENT error and 1.5 with HTTP 400. The UI shows a server error toast ('Apologies for the inconvenience. Our server is currently experiencing technical issues.'). No client-side validation intercepts the values before API submission.
consoleErrors: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 (POST /graphql)
